catalog_url.notes: Category pages return 403 on all modes (requests, curl_cffi, browser). Homepage loads fine.

list_page_url.notes: All category/shop URLs return 403. Homepage and non-shop pages accessible.

detail_url_pattern.notes: Cannot discover product URLs without access to category pages.

pagination.notes: Cannot determine pagination without category page access.

api_response_sample.notes: 80 API hints discovered but all tested endpoints return 404. Next Group platform shares API structure with next.co.uk.

reasons: Cannot discover product URLs or data
limitations: Next Group platform has strong anti-scraping
clm_suitability.recommended_approach: Not suitable. Consider proxy rotation or cookie-based access.

failure_diagnosis.platform_notes: Shares Next Group platform with next.co.uk. Both have same 403 blocking behavior.
next_steps: Check if API requires specific headers
Consider skipping - same platform as next.co.uk
